hooks.command: if [ -f package.json ]; then pnpm prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if [ -f package.json ]; then pnpm eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

if [ -f package.json ] && [ -d node_modules ]; then echo '--- TYPECHECK ---'; pnpm tsc --noEmit || (echo 'TYPECHECK FAILED — fix before declaring done.' && exit 2); echo '--- TESTS ---'; pnpm vitest --run --passWithNoTests || (echo 'TESTS FAILED — fix before declaring done.' && exit 2); echo 'Quality gates passed.'; fi
